markdown:
#  Download RFI Attachments (iOS) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Read Only' or higher permissions on the project's RFIs tool.


##  Steps 
  * Navigate to the **RFIs** tool using the Procore app on an iOS mobile device.


#### Download the Attachments of an Individual RFI
  * Tap **Download** ![Icon Download Circle Mobile](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/e54be8c6601ba97b11889922e7b97ced/a2294649b14c944216881786b7c4775f/icon-download-circle-mobile.png?fm=webp&h=24) next to the RFI you want to download attachments for.


#### Download the Attachments of All RFIs
  * Tap **Download** ![Icon Download Circle Mobile](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/e54be8c6601ba97b11889922e7b97ced/a2294649b14c944216881786b7c4775f/icon-download-circle-mobile.png?fm=webp&h=24) at the top of the RFI log.![Rfi Ios Download All Rfis](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/2513fa8a9a015363386c336c0046e0ce/634dd034813b897deacb8616a4db9c00/rfi-ios-download-all-rfis.png?fm=webp)  
If there is no download icon, the RFI has already been downloaded and can be viewed in offline mode.


## See Also
  * [RFIs (iOS) - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfis-ios/permissions)
  * [Mark an RFI Response as Official (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfis-ios/tutorials/mark-an-rfi-response-as-official-ios)
  * [Respond to an RFI (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfis-ios/tutorials/respond-to-an-rfi-ios)
title: Download RFI Attachments (iOS)
description: How to download an RFI's attachments on an iOS mobile device so that the items can be viewed in offline mode.
